title: Registry Publication, SBOM, Provenance, Vulnerabilities, Policies, and CI Release · Layer and Runtime Forensics
summary: An incident responder inherits a plausible but defective signed and policy-gated image release packet; isolate the first causal fault in registry publication, sbom, provenance, vulnerabilities, policies, and ci release and preserve a regression check before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in signed and policy-gated image release packet and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pra…
objectives: Publish least-privilege authenticated content, verify digest after push, handle immutable tags, retention, mirrors, rate limits, and failure without credential leakage.
Generate, attach, inspect, export, validate, and interpret SPDX SBOM attestations including build-stage and final-image coverage.
Produce minimal or maximal SLSA provenance, locate materials and parameters, protect secret values, and verify the statement against source and builder policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Docker Ci Release Rollback
steps.instruction:
Append the Docker evidence item headed "  # Evidence: docker-ci-release-rollback-1427hc". Tailor its release-policy.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic review command, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run Docker commands later in an authorized disposable transfer environment.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Docker Ci Release Rollback.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Docker Ci Release Rollback into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Docker Ci Release Rollback, keep Docker Ci Release Rollback connected to mechanically reviewable Docker artifact and transfer evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: docker-ci-release-rollback-1427hc
  - competency: docker-ci-release-rollback
    artifact: release-policy.yaml
    decision: ci release rollback
    scenario-variant: 5
    environment: production-like canary with read-only application state
    fault-injection: rotate a required secret between build and runtime
    retained-proof: rendered Compose model and dependency health transition
    case-key: 1427hc
    change: |
      source: reviewed-commit
      base: approved-digest
      output: immutable-registry-digest
      sbom: spdx-attestation
      provenance: max
      vulnerability-policy: severity-and-exploitability
      signature: identity-bound
    verify: docker buildx imagetools inspect candidate@sha256:release && docker scout cves candidate@sha256:release
    failure: Reject tag-only promotion, SBOM-as-vulnerability-scan, unsigned attestations, ignored base drift, or severity alone without reachability and exception ownership.
    repair: Bind source, builder, inputs, output digest, SBOM, provenance, signature, scan policy, exception expiry, and promotion evidence.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
